# zabbix_action_trigger (Data Source)

Looks up a Zabbix trigger action by `id` or `name`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a trigger action by name.
data "zabbix_action_trigger" "by_name" {
  name = "Notify administrators"
}

# Look up a trigger action by ID.
data "zabbix_action_trigger" "by_id" {
  id = "12"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) ID of the trigger action. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Name of the trigger action. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) Status of the trigger action. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`.
